tasks.title: Add --perspective, --docs-path, --test-path flags
tasks.acceptance: --perspective flag accepts 'documentation' or 'testing'. --docs-path is a string flag. --test-path is a string flag. All flags registered in newReviewCmd().

tasks.title: Add perspective validation rules
tasks.acceptance: Invalid --perspective value returns exit code 2. --perspective documentation without --docs-path returns exit code 2. --perspective testing without --test-path returns exit code 2. Non-existent --docs-path returns exit code 3. Non-existent --test-path returns exit code 3. --perspective with --round or --findings returns exit code 2. Empty --perspective (default) produces existing 3-prompt behavior unchanged.
tasks.closed_reason: All 7 validation rules implemented: invalid perspective returns exit 2 with error message, missing docs-path returns exit 2, missing test-path returns exit 2, non-existent docs-path returns exit 3, non-existent test-path returns exit 3, perspective with --round returns exit 2 mutual exclusivity error, perspective with --findings returns exit 2 mutual exclusivity error, empty perspective produces existing 3-prompt behavior unchanged (backward compat verified)

tasks.title: Implement walkDocTree() for directory structure map
tasks.acceptance: walkDocTree(path) returns a string tree representation and a []string of .md file paths. Tree uses Unicode box-drawing characters. index.md files always included regardless of term matching. Config files (config.js, config.ts, config.mts, config.mjs) always included.
tasks.closed_reason: walkDocTree(root, ext) walks directory, collects files matching ext, builds flat tree with prefix chars. Tested with empty dir, 3 files, 20 files.

tasks.title: Implement rankFilesBySpecTerms() for file selection
tasks.acceptance: rankFilesBySpecTerms(files, specLines, max) greps spec heading terms against files. Returns top N files ranked by match count. Always includes index.md and config files regardless of ranking. Max default is 15.
tasks.closed_reason: rankFilesBySpecTerms extracts terms from spec heading text (words > 3 chars), greps each file for term matches, ranks by match count descending. Always includes index.md and config.js/ts/mts/mjs files regardless of rank. Returns top 15 files by default.

tasks.title: Implement readFilesContent() for capped file reading
tasks.acceptance: readFilesContent(files, maxPerFile, maxTotal) reads files and returns map[string]string. Each file capped at maxPerFile chars. Total output capped at maxTotal chars. Defaults: maxPerFile=5000, maxTotal=30000 for docs, maxPerFile=5000, maxTotal=20000 for tests.
tasks.closed_reason: readFilesContent(files, maxPerFile, maxTotal) reads files and returns map[string]string. Each file capped at maxPerFile chars (5000 default). Total output capped at maxTotal chars (30000 for docs, 20000 for tests). Truncation markers added when caps hit.

tasks.title: Implement generateDocPlanPrompt()
tasks.acceptance: Generates a prompt with role='documentation-planner', category='completeness'. Prompt contains: role instruction, spec content (capped 10000 chars), structure map, file contents of ranked files, 5-step analysis checklist (A1-A5), NDJSON output format with action types (create-page, update-section, fix-drift, update-config, add-crossref, update-index), priority levels (must, should, could).
tasks.closed_reason: generateDocPlanPrompt produces prompt with role=documentation-planner, category=completeness. Contains spec content, structure map, file contents, 5-step checklist A1-A5, NDJSON output format with 6 action types and 3 priority levels.

tasks.title: Implement generateTestPlanPrompt()
tasks.acceptance: Generates a prompt with role='test-planner', category='completeness'. Prompt contains: role instruction, spec content (capped 10000 chars), structure map of test directory, test file contents of ranked files, 7-step analysis checklist (T1-T7), NDJSON output format with action types (create-test, update-test, create-fixture), priority levels (must, should, could).
tasks.closed_reason: generateTestPlanPrompt produces prompt with role=test-planner, category=completeness. Contains spec content, structure map, file contents, 7-step checklist T1-T7, NDJSON output format with 3 action types and 3 priority levels.

tasks.title: Wire perspective branch into runReview()
tasks.acceptance: runReview() branches on perspective: empty produces existing 3-prompt behavior, 'documentation' produces single doc prompt, 'testing' produces single test prompt. Returns perspectiveResult struct with perspective, docs_path/test_path, docs_structure/test_structure, prompts array (1 item), review_loop. review_loop.max_rounds=1, convergence='single-pass plan generation'.
tasks.closed_reason: runReview branches on perspective: empty produces 3 adversarial prompts (unchanged), documentation produces single doc plan prompt via runPerspectiveReview, testing produces single test plan prompt. Returns reviewResult with perspective, docs_path/test_path, docs_structure/test_structure, prompts[1], review_loop(max_rounds=1).

tasks.title: Write tests for perspective validation
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover: --perspective documentation with valid --docs-path (exit 0), --perspective testing with valid --test-path (exit 0), --perspective invalid (exit 2), missing --docs-path (exit 2), missing --test-path (exit 2), non-existent --docs-path (exit 3), non-existent --test-path (exit 3), --perspective with --round (exit 2), --perspective with --findings (exit 2), empty perspective unchanged behavior.
tasks.closed_reason: 14 tests: TestReviewPerspectiveDocBasic, TestReviewPerspectiveTestBasic, TestReviewPerspectiveInvalid, TestReviewPerspectiveMissingDocsPath, TestReviewPerspectiveMissingTestPath, TestReviewPerspectiveDocsPathNotFound, TestReviewPerspectiveTestPathNotFound, TestReviewPerspectiveMutuallyExclusiveRound, TestReviewPerspectiveMutuallyExclusiveFindings, TestReviewPerspectiveDefaultUnchanged.

tasks.title: Write tests for documentation perspective prompt content
tasks.acceptance: Tests verify: prompt has role='documentation-planner', prompt contains structure map, prompt contains spec content, prompt contains analysis checklist items A1-A5, prompt contains output format with action types, empty docs directory works without panic, many-files directory caps at 15 reviewed files, docs_structure.total_files and reviewed_files correct in output.
tasks.closed_reason: TestReviewPerspectiveDocPromptContent verifies: role=documentation-planner, structure map contains index.md, prompt contains spec content, checklist A1-A5 present, all 6 action types in output format, priority levels, review_loop max_rounds=1. TestReviewPerspectiveEmptyDocsDir and TestReviewPerspectiveManyFilesCapped cover edge cases.

tasks.title: Write tests for testing perspective prompt content
tasks.acceptance: Tests verify: prompt has role='test-planner', prompt contains test structure map, prompt contains spec content, prompt contains analysis checklist items T1-T7, prompt contains output format with action types, test_structure.total_files and reviewed_files correct in output.
tasks.closed_reason: TestReviewPerspectiveTestPromptContent verifies: role=test-planner, test_structure correct with review_test.go, prompt contains spec content, checklist T1-T7 present, all 3 action types in output format.
